name: Crown of Thorns
flavorText: "When they had platted a crown of thorns, they put it upon his head." — Matthew 27:29
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Guercino's "Christ Crowned with Thorns" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.sourceNotes: A direct old-master crown-of-thorns work makes this an exact thematic match.
